function.output:
# Variation 1

```dax
// Total e-commerce revenue for the year 2025
EVALUATE
  ROW(
    "Total E-commerce Revenue 2025",
    CALCULATE(
      [Total Revenue], // 'order_lines'[Total Revenue] measure
      FILTER(
        ALL('orders'[order_at]),
        YEAR('orders'[order_at]) == 2025
      )
    )
  )
```
